Mastermind Live Teaching with Bas Wouters | session 1
Deep-dive on Human Decision Making
Learn the importance of understanding human decision-making as a key to influencing decisions and guiding individuals toward
intended outcomes. You'll explore foundational aspects of decision-making, including Kahneman's theory of System 1 and System
2, and how Dr. Cialdini's principles of persuasion can be systematically applied to influence behavior effectively.
Mastermind Teaching
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
